transcript:
CALLER: Hi. Actually I want to cancel my appointment for now and maybe book in about a month. My insurance approval is still pending.
AGENT: Understood, no problem at all. Name and appointment details?
CALLER: Narayan Joshi. I had next Tuesday 10 AM with Dr. Vinay Kapoor.
AGENT: Got it. Narayan Joshi, Tuesday 10 AM with Dr. Kapoor — cancelling this. Once your insurance approval comes through, just call us back and we'll rebook.
CALLER: Will there be any priority given since I cancelled due to insurance?
AGENT: We'll note the reason for cancellation. While we can't guarantee priority, we'll try our best to accommodate your preferred slot when you call back.
CALLER: Fair enough. Thank you.
AGENT: Good luck with the insurance process. Hope it clears soon!
